trans-unit.source: Deprecated. `aspire new` now derives the package channel from the running CLI's identity channel. Passing this option causes the command to fail.
trans-unit.target: Используемый канал для шаблонов (стабильный, ежедневный)

trans-unit.source: Deprecated. `aspire new` now derives the package channel from the running CLI's identity channel. Passing this option causes the command to fail.
trans-unit.target: Используемый канал для шаблонов (стабильный, промежуточный, ежедневный)

trans-unit.source: The --channel option is no longer supported by `aspire new`. The package channel is now pinned to the running CLI's identity channel ('{0}').
trans-unit.target: The --channel option is no longer supported by `aspire new`. The package channel is now pinned to the running CLI's identity channel ('{0}').

trans-unit.source: Directly in the selected folder
trans-unit.target: Directly in the selected folder

trans-unit.source: In a subdirectory named '{0}' in the selected folder
trans-unit.target: In a subdirectory named '{0}' in the selected folder

trans-unit.source: Create a new app from an Aspire starter template
trans-unit.target: Создайте новый проект Aspire.

trans-unit.source: Enter the output path
trans-unit.target: Enter the output path

trans-unit.source: Enter the project name
trans-unit.target: Введите имя проекта

trans-unit.source: Invalid project name.
trans-unit.target: Недопустимое имя проекта.

trans-unit.source: The programming language for the AppHost
trans-unit.target: The programming language for the AppHost

trans-unit.source: The name of the project to create
trans-unit.target: Имя создаваемого проекта.

trans-unit.source: No channel found matching '{0}'. Valid options are: {1}.
trans-unit.target: No channel found matching '{0}'. Valid options are: {1}.

trans-unit.source: No package channels are available.
trans-unit.target: No package channels are available.

trans-unit.source: A template must be specified when running in non-interactive mode. Use 'aspire new <template>'.
trans-unit.target: A template must be specified when running in non-interactive mode. Use 'aspire new <template>'.

trans-unit.source: The output path for the project
trans-unit.target: Выходной путь для проекта.

trans-unit.source: The output directory '{0}' already exists and is not empty. Specify --output with a different location.
trans-unit.target: The output directory '{0}' already exists and is not empty. Specify --output with a different location.

trans-unit.source: The output directory '{0}' already exists and is not empty. Specify a different location.
trans-unit.target: The output directory '{0}' already exists and is not empty. Specify a different location.

trans-unit.source: The output path '{0}' contains invalid characters.
trans-unit.target: The output path '{0}' contains invalid characters.

trans-unit.source: Resolving template version...
trans-unit.target: Разрешение версии шаблона...

trans-unit.source: Select a template:
trans-unit.target: Выберите шаблон:

trans-unit.source: Select a template version:
trans-unit.target: Выберите версию шаблона:

trans-unit.source: Where do you want the project to be created?
trans-unit.target: Where do you want the project to be created?

trans-unit.source: The NuGet source to use for the project templates
trans-unit.target: Источник NuGet для использования в шаблонах проекта.

trans-unit.source: The --source URL includes credentials, a query string, or a fragment and cannot be written to the project's NuGet.config. Configure credentials with NuGet credential providers or user-level NuGet configuration, then pass the feed URL without embedded secrets.
trans-unit.target: The --source URL includes credentials, a query string, or a fragment and cannot be written to the project's NuGet.config. Configure credentials with NuGet credential providers or user-level NuGet configuration, then pass the feed URL without embedded secrets.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire project templates package version '{0}' that matches the running CLI build was not found in the '{1}' channel. Available versions: {2}.
trans-unit.target: The Aspire project templates package version '{0}' that matches the running CLI build was not found in the '{1}' channel. Available versions: {2}.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire project templates package version '{0}' that matches the running CLI build was not found in the '{1}' channel. No template package versions were found in this channel.
trans-unit.target: The Aspire project templates package version '{0}' that matches the running CLI build was not found in the '{1}' channel. No template package versions were found in this channel.

trans-unit.source: (use pre-release templates)
trans-unit.target: (использовать шаблоны предварительного выпуска)

trans-unit.source: Deprecated. `aspire new` now always installs the project templates package that matches the running CLI build. Passing this option causes the command to fail.
trans-unit.target: Версия шаблонов проекта, которую следует использовать.

trans-unit.source: The --version option is no longer supported by `aspire new`. The project templates package version is now pinned to the running CLI build ({0}).
trans-unit.target: The --version option is no longer supported by `aspire new`. The project templates package version is now pinned to the running CLI build ({0}).
